zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Moulton是Sir Robert  Maryett Moulton of Ormsby的女兒，於1535年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可史可拉特比。她於1565年與John Greene在英國英格蘭艾可納福斯托可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1575年9月12日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年40歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Moulton was born in 1535, in Scratby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Robert  Maryett Moulton of Ormsby. She married John Greene in 1565, in Navestock, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 12 September 1575, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Moulton est née en 1535, à Scratby, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Robert  Maryett Moulton of Ormsby. Elle a épousé John Greene en 1565, à Navestock, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 septembre 1575, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Moultonは1535年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスクラトビーでSir Robert  Maryett Moulton of Ormsbyの娘として生まれた。1565年にイギリスイギリスエセックスナベストックでJohn Greeneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1575年9月12日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで40歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.Ormesby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdo: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Moulton(은)는 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스크라트비에서 Sir Robert  Maryett Moulton of Ormsby의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1565년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 나베스톡에서 John Greene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 9월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Moulton nasceu em 1535, em Scratby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Sir Robert  Maryett Moulton of Ormsby. Ela casou-se com John Greene em 1565, em Navestock, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 12 de setembro de 1575, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Moulton родилась в 1535 г. в местности скратби, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir Robert  Maryett Moulton of Ormsby. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Greene в 1565 г. в местности навестокк, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 12 сентября 1575 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes Moulton nació en 1535, en Scratby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Sir Robert  Maryett Moulton of Ormsby. Se casó con John Greene en 1565, en Navestock, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 12 de septiembre de 1575, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra.
